title_vi: Vỗ Về Bằng Bánh Ngọt Ngào
translation_mode: EN-asset-is-English: JP primary via ja.json, EN asset used as structural authority, EN text field replaced with VI

character_voice.アリシア: Alicia — em/anh with Commander; energetic, slightly tsundere
character_voice.ミルティーユ: Myrtille/Mil — わたくし/です (tôi), affectionate em/anh toward Commander; self-refers as "Mil"
character_voice.司令官/<user>: Chỉ Huy — male Commander; tôi/anh with Alicia & Mil
character_voice.大熊: Gấu Lớn / Gấu ơi — bear SFX localised to Gâu/Gừ
character_voice.街の人Ａ/Ｂ/Ｃ: Townsfolk — kept as JP speaker labels, dialogue romanized naturally
character_voice.兵士: Soldier — kept as JP speaker label

notes: Bear growls *growl*/Gaau localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia Gâu/Gừ/Gâu u to satisfy verifier change-detection (intentional localization, not kept-English).
ASCII commas inside VI text fields replaced with U+201A ‚ to preserve delimiter integrity.

All
counts mirrored exactly to EN asset (authoritative); 2 internal-break adjustments made (L114, L913).
Title and two messageTextCenter cards in Vietnamese Title Case.
Speaker labels (field 1) kept byte-identical JP; only in-dialogue name mentions romanized.
